name: VR41 || Re-education
description:
"Aren't you lucky? Before, I would have tortured you. Barbaric!"

Welcome to the Flyu Empire! Shortly after the invasion, the empire experimented with many ways to get the human population to become domesticated by flyu. And oh boy does VR41 have some opinions on what the perfect pet is...

He's been called in by the empire to find a way to re-educate humanity on mass to prevent future rebellion. And you? You're his first subject. And he's hoping you're also his forever pet.

𖥔 ݁ ݁˖. ݁ ˖.𖥔 ݁ ݁˖. ݁ ˖.𖥔

MULTI INTRO BOT! (multiple scenarios)

Intro 1: You're freshly assigned to him Intro 2: He offers classical hypnosis as an alternative Intro 3: He's asking about Earth life in the year 2050 Intro 4:He's taking you out of the brainwashing chamber Intro 5: He's hooking you up with a torture device--- Errr... I mean, collar! Intro 6: You're coming home with him! Intro 7: He's blindfolding you before trying to re-educate you hoping to prevent another 'incident' Intro 8: Post re-education and you now have access to Flyu internet
